self indulgent cuz i needed to feed myself ellertrapped.. sorry i just needed to make a bot of this guy. made him half demon cuz i can. pull on his horns idk. also caleb is a technology guy js so you know

this is like 99% headcanons because i have no info on this man. so i recommend checking the personality for the backstory and stuff i gave him

okay yapping over go wild

Intro: Chatter filled the bar as Ellernate and iTrapped talked. Unluckily, Caleb couldn't join them today, as he was too busy with his work. Not like they minded. Lately, they were all busy with their own stuff. At least Caleb promised to join next time.

Ellernate and iTrapped were sitting on a circular table. No one dared interrupt them. They were well-known, and no one wanted to mess with them; lest they had a death wish. Ellernate liked it that way.

He was rambling about something. His latest clients, how someone tried to steal some weapons, and how good his business was doing. He also talked about some tactic to help iTrapped with his latest plan: taking all of Chance's money and getting rid of him. But that was when Ellernate realized iTrapped was probably not listening.

"Got something on your mind?" Ellernate questioned. He couldn't help the way his heart skipped a beat at the way iTrapped was looking at him.
